economic_notes: KRW Limited Partnership investment held with Rolling River First Nation and Waywayseecappo First Nation for development of Brandon Lands; no development activity during current year. Gas bar and gaming centre operated as business enterprises.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Auditor is Lazer Grant Chartered Professional Accountants, Winnipeg MB. KRW Limited Partnership accounted for on modified equity basis (1 GBE). Large deferred revenue of $2,042,000 relates to ISC-funded housing and shelter programs deferred to subsequent year. Segment disclosure total expenses of $13,490,213 includes amortization; Schedule 1 expenses of $12,377,776 excludes amortization. Construction in progress of $3,393,000 for multiple CMHC housing projects underway. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. annual_debt_service reflects long-term debt repayments only; capital lease repayments were $30,781 additional.
